scripts.deploy:trigger:prod: pnpm dlx trigger.dev@latest deploy . --config trigger.config.ts --env prod
scripts.deploy:trigger:prod:dry-run: pnpm dlx trigger.dev@latest deploy . --config trigger.config.ts --env prod --dry-run
scripts.deploy:trigger:staging: pnpm dlx trigger.dev@latest deploy . --config trigger.config.ts --env staging
scripts.deploy:trigger:staging:dry-run: pnpm dlx trigger.dev@latest deploy . --config trigger.config.ts --env staging --dry-run
